name: Google Maps
description: Web mapping platform by Google offering satellite imagery, street maps, real-time traffic, and turn-by-turn navigation.

years.notes: Pre-Material refresh app icon (Nov 2014 → Sep 2015). Tilted card with intersecting roads, prominent red pin and white 'g' watermark. Reframed from native 96×96 viewBox via scale(0.25); dropped drop-shadow, gradient overlays and the inner image highlight from the upstream Wikimedia file.

Material Design refresh (Sep 2015 → Feb 2020). Flat tilted card with white 'G' watermark, intersecting green/yellow/blue roads and a flat red teardrop pin. Reframed from native 5644×5644 viewBox via scale(0.004252); dropped the Gaussian-blur drop shadow and the clip-path used only by the filter.

Feb 6, 2020 — 15th-anniversary redesign. Dropped the card metaphor entirely and returned to a pure teardrop pin built from five Google-coloured wedges around a white center hole. Reframed from native 92.3×132.3 viewBox via translate(3.6253 0) scale(0.18141) (inscribed vertically into the 24×24 grid).

2026 Google Workspace refresh — teardrop pin filled with a multi-hue gradient sweeping red → yellow → green → blue → magenta around the white center hole. Upstream ships the gradient as a 4 MB PNG clipped by the pin silhouette; re-vectorized here as five overlapping radial gradients layered inside a clipPath of the pin path (same approach as google-drive 2026).
